title: Know the Risk Before You Route
text:
Know the Risk Before You Route
    A risk quantification API for fleet truck routes — real-time scores, contributing factors, and confidence intervals in a single call.
    
      Request Early Access
      Read the Docs →
    
  
  
    
      
        
        terminal
      
      
        $ llano compare \
        "4710 N PanAm Expy, San Antonio" \
        "250 University, Round Rock" \
        --waypoints "TX-130" "I-35" "US-183"
         
        Scoring 3 routes...
         
        
            A
          via TX-130/45       
          69/100 ● GOOD  
          ✓ Go
        
        
            B
          via I-35 thru Austin
          42/100 ● FAIR  
          ⚠ Monitor
        
        
            C
          via US-183 East    
          21/100 ● POOR 
          ✕ Delay
        
         
          Recommendation: Route A
          Batch response: 287ms
         
        
      
    
  




  2.4M+Routes Scored
  
  48States Covered
  
  94%Prediction Accuracy
  
  <200msAvg Response Time




  HOW IT WORKS
  From Route to Risk in Milliseconds
  
    
      01
      Submit a Route
      Send origin, destination, vehicle class, and departure time to the API.
    
    →
    
      02
      Score Computed
      Our model ingests real-time weather, traffic, road quality, and historical incident data.
    
    →
    
      03
      Safety Score Returned
      Receive a 0–100 safety score, grade, confidence interval, contributing factors, and hotspot locations.
    
  




  ROUTE COMPARISON
  Score Before You Dispatch
  Evaluate multiple options in parallel. Route smarter, not harder.
  

    
      
        Route A
        GOOD
      
      San Antonio → TX-130/45 via Lockhart → Round Rock
      
        69
        
          
        
      
      
        Light toll road traffic0.19
        Clear weather0.15
        Well-maintained surface0.10
      
      ✓  Recommended · Fewest Delays
    

    
      
        Route B
        FAIR
      
      San Antonio → I-35 through Austin → Round Rock
      
        42
        
          
        
      
      
        Austin urban congestion0.41
        Active I-35 construction0.27
        Moderate weather risk0.12
      
      ⚠  Monitor Conditions
    

    
      
        Route C
        POOR
      
      San Antonio → US-183 East via Gonzales → Round Rock
      
        21
        
          
        
      
      
        Rural road conditions0.44
        Crosswind advisory0.33
        Limited rest stops0.21
      
      ✕  Delay Recommended
    

  




  CAPABILITIES
  Built for the Fleet Stack
  Everything your logistics platform needs to route smarter.
  
    
      🛣️
      Route Risk Scoring
      Composite risk scores for any truck route based on road conditions, traffic patterns, and historical incident data.
    
    
      ⚡
      Real-Time Conditions
      Live risk updates as conditions change — weather events, active construction, and traffic incidents reflected instantly.
    
    
      🔌
      REST API
      Clean RESTful endpoints designed for easy integration with TMS, dispatch, and fleet management platforms.
    
    
      📊
      Fleet Analytics
      Aggregate risk metrics across your entire fleet to surface patterns and benchmark route safety over time.
    
  




  API PREVIEW
  Simple to Call. Rich in Detail.
  One endpoint. Bring your own route or let us plan it.
  

    
      
        
        route_score.py
      
      import llano

client = llano.Client(api_key="sk_live_••••••••")

# Option A — pass a geometry from Samsara, TomTom, etc.
result = client.routes.score(
    geometry      = route_geojson,
    vehicle_class = "class_8",
    depart_at     = "2026-03-15T06:00"
)

# Option B — just give us O&D, we'll route it
result = client.routes.score(
    origin        = "4710 N PanAm Expy, San Antonio, TX",
    destination   = "250 University, Round Rock, TX",
    vehicle_class = "class_8",
    depart_at     = "2026-03-15T06:00"
)

# Same response either way
print(result.score)       # 41.2
print(result.grade)       # "FAIR"
print(result.routing)     # "provided" | "llano"

for h in result.hotspots:
    print(h.score, h.reason)
# 28  "construction"
# 35  "weather"
    

    
      
        
          
            
              
              
              
            
          
          
          
          41.2
          FAIR SAFETY
        
      
      
        
          Construction
          
          0.38
        
        
          Weather
          
          0.24
        
        
          Traffic
          
          0.19
        
      
      
        route_idrt_8xK2mNpQ
        confidence0.91
        latency148ms
      
    

  




  COVERAGE
  Built for the Roads That Matter
  From major interstates to rural corridors, Llano covers the routes your fleet depends on.
  








  Ready to de-risk your routes?
  Llano is in early access. Join the waitlist and be first to integrate.
